title: Quantum Truth Stack
summary: Quantum science studies the behaviour of matter and information at the smallest scales, where probability and superposition replace classical intuition.
starterPack: Start with NIST and IBM Quantum.
Read Preskill and Aaronson for clear interpretation.
Use Quanta and Nature Quantum Information for context.

tiers.title: First Principles
tiers.description: Core ideas that make quantum theory coherent.

items.name: Superposition
items.description: Systems can exist in combinations of states before measurement.

items.name: Measurement changes the system
items.description: Observation is not passive at quantum scale.

items.name: Probability amplitudes
items.description: The theory predicts likelihoods, not just outcomes.

items.description: Major platform for quantum research and access.

items.description: Pioneering quantum computing and explanation theory.

tiers.title: Frontier Watchlist
tiers.description: Quantum problems still being worked out.

items.name: Error correction
items.description: Fault tolerance and reliable logical qubits.

items.name: Quantum networking

items.name: Quantum sensing
